titleStmt.title: SII 17.590: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 590. (A.R. No. 545 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the first prākāra in the Tyāgarājasvāmin temple.
The details of date given viz. Year 6, Āvaṇi, śu. Āyilyam are insufficient to calculate the equivalent.

This inscription records the sale of land, made tax-free, to god Śrīmūlasthānamuḍaiyār by Ponmalai-chchēri Uḍaiyāṉ. Vēḷāṉ. Śūriyaṉ alias Virudarājabhayaṅkara Aḻundūr-Vēḷāṉ, receiving 4 aṉṟāḍu naṟkāśu granted to the temple for maintaining a garden, by Pālaiyūruḍaiyān Chandraśēkharan Ādiviḍaṅgaṉ. alias Mahābalivāṇarāyar. Of the 4 kāśu, 1 kāśu is stated to be the cost of the land and 3 kāśu, the lump sum provided for making it tax-free.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripanmarāna tribhuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvikkiramacoḻadevaṟkku yāṇṭu Āṟāvatu Āvaṇi māsattu pūrvvapakṣattu Āyileyattu nāḷ keya māṇikka vaḷanāṭṭut tiruvārurk kūṟṟattu tevatānam kkuṭi kāṇi Uṭaiya poṉ malaiceri Uṭaiyāṉ veḷān cūriyanāṉa virutarāya payaṅkara Aḻuntur � vaṟku nān viṟṟukkuṭuttu Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta paricāvatu En kāṇiyāna mum(ma)maṭicoḻanallūr yāṇṭu 5 Āvatu pacānam cāviyāy Iṟai taṭṭinamaiyil Itukku Uṭal Illāmaiyil kalveṭṭi Iṟukka veṇṭinamaiyil Ivar Āticaṇṭeśvaradevar paṇṭārattu putu
vaṇṭāḻañcairi Uṭaiyān veṇkāṭu toḷari rājar manumantri pālaiyūruṭaiyān cantiracekaran Āti viṭaṅkaṉāna mahābali vāṇarāyar tamakku tanma(m)māka nilaṅkoṇṭu śrīmūlasthānamuṭaiyāṟkkut tirunantavanam ceyya nilamākkak kaik kki vaitta kācu koṇṭu nāṉ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilammāvatu me kuṭuttu Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai viṟkiṉṟa nilattukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai paṭṭaṇap peruvaḻikkum melpāṟkellai panaṅkuṭi Ayyan ttukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ittevar tirunantavānam śaṇḍeśvaran tiru nantavānattukkut terkkum
Ivvicainta peruṉānkellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa punce(ye)y kuḻi 100 Ikkuḻi nūṟum viṟṟukku ṭuttu koḷvutāna Aṉṟāṭu nalkācu 1 Ikkācu Oṉṟum Innilattukku Iṟaiyiḻiccak koṇṭa Aṉṟāṭu nalkācu 3 muṉṟum Ākak kācu 4 Ikkācu nālu ṟakkāṭṭi kaiccelavaṟakkoṇṭu vilaikkaṟa viṟṟu poruḷaṟak ṇḍaśvaradevarkkum ponmalaicceri Uṭaiyāṉ veḷān cūriyaṉāna virutarāja payaṅkara Aḻuntūr veḷāṉen Innilattukku Ituve vilaiyāvatākavum Ituve poruḷmāvaṟutipporuḷ cilavolai yāvatākavum Ituvallatu poruḷmāvaṟutipporuḷ cilavolai
kāṭṭakkaṭavarallātaārākavum Ikkuḻi nūṟṟukkum van=ta peruvari cilavari puṉceykkaṭamai yellām In=ta mummuṭicoḻanallūrile Īñcu Eṟaṭṭukkoṇṭu nāne Iṟukka Itte varkku Ikkuḻi nūṟum tirunan=tavanamāka Iṟaiyiliye Anupavikkakkaṭavarākavum kuṭutten Ivvātiśeṇḍaśvaradevaṟkku Ivvaḻuntūr veḷānen lilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷḷappeṟuvārāka cammatittu Ikkācu nālum kaikkoṇṭu Ikkuḻi nūṟum viṟṟu Iṟaiyili ceytukuṭutten Ivvādiśaṇḍeśvarade vaṟkku Ivvirutarāya payaṅkara Aḻuntūrveḷāṉen Ivarkaḷ colla Ippiramāṇam Eḻuti nen Āṇai cāttaṅkuṭi mattiyasthaṉ Ālaiveli Uṭai
yān veḷān ciṅkappirāṉen Ivai Enneḻuttu Ippaṭi Icaiñcu Ikkācu nāluṅ koṇṭu Ikkuḻi nūṟum viṟṟu Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutten veḷān cūriyanāna virutarāyapayaṅkara Aḻuntūrveḷānen Ivai Enneḻuttu Ippaṭikkup ponmalaic ceriuṭaiyān cūriyan kāṭuyilā neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai cūriyan tiruvaraṅka muṭaiyā neḻuttu Ippaṭi karukkaṅkuṭaiyān(yā) pañcaneti tirucciṟṟampala muṭaiyā neḻuttu Itu Ampalattāṭi puṟṟiṭaṅkoṇṭān samñaiyaratanamaikku Ivai Ālaiveli yuṭaiyāneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven mārāyan �ṟuṭaiyānāna vicālaiyappallavaraya neḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven kārampicceṭṭu Iḷaiyakecuva
paṭṭaneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṟ kārampiceṭṭuk kecuvapaṭṭaneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven viḷama rāna jayataraccaruppatimaṅkalattu śrī vaikānasan tittramunitgotrattu kaṇapuraṅ kecuva paṭṭanen Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ cūralūrkiḻavan rājentracoḻan tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyā nen Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven Aṅkamaṅkalamāna tirucciṟṟampalapurattu viyāThe inscription stops here.
Digital edition of SII 17.590 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
